title: New Setting Makes YouTube Shorts Look Better!

transcript.text: This is how to watch YouTube Shorts with a clean screen. As you can see, this short has icons on the side and text at the bottom. So, to remove them, tap the three dots in the top right-hand corner and select clear [music] screen. That will do exactly what it says, leaving one small icon that will bring back the user interface if needed. One more thing, this isn't a permanent setting. When you swipe to the next short, everything will automatically come back. And that is it. Follow for more YouTube tips.
